rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"UserStore.verifyPassword() uses === for hash comparison, creating a timing-attack vulnerability. Always use crypto.timingSafeEqual for comparing secrets/hashes.","scope":"src/auth/user-store.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Fields that must be write-only for clients (like hash/salt) need both hidden:true and access:{read:()=>false,update:()=>false} — neither alone is sufficient.","scope":"src/users/Users.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"The codebase uses PBKDF2 with 25000 iterations, sha256, and 512-bit output for password hashing. Extract params to shared module before using.","scope":"src/auth"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Splitting password logic into a dedicated password-utils.ts module keeps AuthService clean and enables reuse across UserStore and other auth paths.","scope":"src/auth/password-utils.ts"}]}
